title: cannabis sativa var. ruderalis
intro: Cannabis sativa var. ruderalis, also known as cannabis ruderalis, is a subspecies of the cannabis plant that is native to Russia and Eastern Europe and is known for its hardy and resilient nature. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anticonvulsant effects, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of cannabis ruderalis include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as potential benefits for conditions such as multiple sclerosis and epilepsy. Cannabis ruderalis can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tinctures, oils, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
